title: AI Prices Soar: Fable's Fall & China's Rise? #shorts
summary: Frontier AI models are becoming too expensive and vulnerable. Chinese open-source alternatives are emerging as cheaper options, potentially reshaping the global AI landscape amid rising geopolitical tensions.
writeup: This short argues that frontier AI models are growing both expensive and vulnerable, opening space for cheaper Chinese open-source alternatives. The stakes are economic and geopolitical: lower-cost models could reshape the global AI landscape amid rising tensions. The takeaway is that pricing pressure on foundation models may shift advantage toward open-source competitors.
